segments.text: Then the Lord answered Job out of the whirlwind,
Who is this who questions my wisdom by talking so ignorantly?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Prepare yourself, be strong,  for I am going to question you, and you must answer me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Where were you when I laid the foundation of the earth? Tell me, if you have such knowledge!
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Who decided its dimensions? Don't you know? Who stretched out a measuring line?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: What do its foundations rest upon? Who laid its cornerstone,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: when the stars of the morning sang together and all the angels shouted for joy.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Who laid down the boundaries of the sea when it was born?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Who clothed it with clouds, and wrapped it in a blanket of deep darkness?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I set its limits, marking its borders.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I said, ‘You may come here, but no farther. Here is where your proud waves stop.’
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: During your lifetime, have you ever ordered the morning to begin?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Have you ever told the dawn where to appear that it might take hold of the corners of the earth and shake the wicked out?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The earth is changed like clay under a seal;  its features st and out like a crumpled garment.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The ‘light’ of the wicked is taken away from them; their acts of violence are stopped.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Have you entered the sources of the sea? Have you explored their hidden depths?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Have you been shown where the gates of death are? Have you seen the gates of utter darkness?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do you know how far the earth extends? Tell me if you know all this!
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: In which direction does light live? Where does darkness dwell?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Can you take them home? Do you know the way to where they live?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Of course you know, because you were already born then! You've lived so long!
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Have you been to where the snow is kept? Have you seen where the hail is held?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I have stored them up for the time of trouble, for the day of war and battle.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do you know the way to where light comes from, or to where the east wind blows over the earth?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Who cuts a channel for the rain to flow? Who creates a path for the thunderbolt?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Who brings rain to an uninhabited land, to a desert where nobody lives,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: to water a parched wasteland to make the green grass grow?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Does the rain have a father? Who was the father of the dewdrops?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Who was the mother of ice? Does the frost of the air have a mother?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Water turns into rock-hard ice; its surface freezes solid.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Can you tie together the stars of the Pleiades? Can you loosen the belt of the Orion constellation?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Can you guide the stars of Mazzaroth at the right time? Can you direct the Great Bear constellation and its other stars?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do you know the laws of the heavens? Can you apply them to the earth?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Can you shout to the clouds and command them to pour rain down on you?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Can you send out bolts of lightning and direct them, so that they can answer you saying, ‘Here we are’?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Who has placed wisdom inside people? Who has given understanding to the mind?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Who is clever enough to count the clouds? Who can turn heaven's water jars on their sides
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: when the dust has baked into a solid mass?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Can you hunt prey for the lion? Can you feed the lion cubs
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: as they crouch down in their dens and lie in wait in the bushes?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Who provides food for the raven when its young cry out to God, weak from starvation?
segments.speaker: God
